title: gutierrezia gilliesii
intro: Gutierrezia gilliesii, also known as the Broom Snakeweed, is a shrub-like plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Gutierrezia gilliesii include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and topical applications, often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
